title: Climate and UNFCCC Position Paper (2026)
content: This paper outlines the Sendai Stakeholder Engagement Mechanism (SEM)’s position and priorities for 2026. SEM calls for the systematic integration of DRR across all climate policy frameworks and processes.

title: Financing implementation of the comprehensive school safety framework: Policy brief

title: Translating under pressure: domain-aware LLMs for crisis communication
content: The study is about developing a domain-adaptive approach to improve multilingual crisis communication in situations where high-quality parallel data are limited.
snippet: The study is about developing a domain-adaptive approach to improve multilingual crisis communication in situations where high-quality parallel data are limited.

title: Cyprus launches national public warning system, powered by GCC and Intersec
content: As part of a broader reorganization of the civil protection sector, the Cyprus Civil Defence mandated GCC and Intersec to power the new Public Warning System.
snippet: As part of a broader reorganization of the civil protection sector, the Cyprus Civil Defence mandated GCC and Intersec to power the new Public Warning System.

title: Widening polarization in Americans’ perception of the health harms of climate change (2014–2024)
content: In the US, Americans are experiencing many impacts, including heat stroke due to more frequent and intense heat waves; higher rates of respiratory diseases due to air pollution; and increased exposure to food-, vector-, and water-borne diseases.

title: Moor project to reduce risk of severe wildfires
content: The risk of severe wildfires could be cut by reducing the dominance of a moorland grass that leaves the landscape vulnerable to outbreaks, according to researchers.
snippet: The risk of severe wildfires could be cut by reducing the dominance of a moorland grass that leaves the landscape vulnerable to outbreaks, according to researchers.

title: 2010: The wide reach of cascading impacts from volcanoes
content: 2010 Eyjafjallajökull eruption showed volcanic ash can trigger global transport and supply chain disruption beyond local damage, reshaping insurance BI/CBI thinking and driving new risk modelling.
snippet: 2010 Eyjafjallajökull eruption showed volcanic ash can trigger global transport and supply chain disruption beyond local damage, reshaping insurance BI/CBI thinking and driving new risk modelling.

title: Climate risks to Syria’s urban water and sanitation systems

title: How to manage crises differently in ASALs without talking about a nexus: what we can learn from the water sector

title: The role of the spatial scale in flood hazard and risk mapping for informing land-use planning: Insights from Aotearoa New Zealand

title: Habitat suitability for desert locust across arid and semi-arid regions of India

title: Neglecting spatiotemporal rainfall variability misrepresents flood hazard and risk
content: This study provides the comparison of flood hazard maps and flood risk (damage) estimates derived from idealized design storms against those generated using stochastic storm transposition.
snippet: This study provides the comparison of flood hazard maps and flood risk (damage) estimates derived from idealized design storms against those generated using stochastic storm transposition.

title: How Europe became the world champion of heat deaths
content: The continent with the lowest number of hot days leads the world in heat mortality. Europe’s self-inflicted aversion to air conditioning betrays a deeper hostility to energy and to progress itself.

title: Data suggests greater glacial flood risk faced by Bhutan
